name: Add Volcano
about: Request a new volcano be added to the data list

## 🌋 Volcano Information

Fill in all fields below. Refer to <https://volcano.si.edu/> for reference data.

**Volcano Number (GVP):**

**Volcano Name:**

**Country:**

**Volcanic Region Group:**

**Volcanic Region:**

**Volcano Landform** (e.g., Composite, Caldera, Cluster, Minor):

**Primary Volcano Type** (e.g., Stratovolcano, Shield, Caldera, Volcanic field, Lava dome(s)):

**Activity Evidence** (e.g., Eruption Observed, Eruption Dated, Evidence Credible, Evidence Uncertain):

**Last Known Eruption** (e.g., 1944 CE, 8300 BCE, Unknown):

**Latitude** (decimal degrees, e.g., 40.821):

**Longitude** (decimal degrees, e.g., 14.426):

**Elevation (m):**

**Dominant Rock Type** (e.g., Basalt / Picro-Basalt, Andesite / Basaltic Andesite):

**Tectonic Setting** (e.g., Subduction zone / Continental crust (>25 km), Rift zone / Oceanic crust (<15 km)):

**Epoch:**

- [ ] Holocene
- [ ] Pleistocene

## 📎 Source

**GVP Link** (if available): `https://volcano.si.edu/volcano.cfm?vn=`

**Other source or reference:**

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other relevant information about this volcano.
